feed.title: ସତ୍ୟଜିତ ପୁହାଣ - conferences
feed.subtitle: ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ସିଣା, ତାଇଭାନର ଉଚ୍ଚଭୁମି ଭୂତବିଦ୍ଜ୍ଞାନ, QCD ଓ ହାଡ୍ରୋନିକ୍ ଫିଜିକ୍ସର ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞାସତ୍ଯଜିତ ପୁହାଣର ବ୍ଯକ୍ତିଗତ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ବେସଭୂମିହି (/Satyajit Puhan).

entry.title: EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure 2026 — Academia Sinica, Taipei
entry.summary:
Workshop: EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure

Venue: Institute of Physics, Academia Sinica, Taipei, Taiwan

Dates: April 29 – May 1, 2026

Mode: In person

I attended the EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure hosted at the Institute of Physics, Academia Sinica, Taipei. The workshop brought together experts in experiments, phenomenology, and lattice calculations relevant to the upcoming Electron-Ion Collider (EIC).

entry.title: ICFHEP 2025 — IIT Bhilai, Chhattisgarh
entry.summary:
Event: International Conference on Frontiers of High Energy Physics (ICFHEP)

Venue: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai, Chhattisgarh (Feb 13–15, 2025)

Participated in this international conference during my visiting fellowship at IIT Bhilai, where I also worked with Prof. Sabyasachi Ghosh on applications of the NJL model for understanding hadron structure.

entry.title: PSI Particle Physics Summer School — Zuoz, Switzerland
entry.summary:
Event: PSI Particle Physics Summer School — From Low to High: Particle Physics at the Frontier

Venue: Lyceum Alpinum, Zuoz, Switzerland (Aug 4–10, 2024)

Attended this prestigious international summer school covering cutting-edge topics at the frontiers of particle physics, from precision measurements to high-energy collider experiments.
